skill.name: executing-plans
skill.description: Guides an AI assistant through executing a written implementation plan in small batches with review checkpoints.
skill.summary: Execute implementation plans with batch work, verification, and human review checkpoints.
skill.author: Cycleaddict

security_audit.summary: Static analysis flagged a weak cryptographic algorithm at SKILL.md:3, but that line is front matter description text and contains no cryptographic code. No evidence found of prompt injection, data exfiltration, network access, filesystem access, external command execution, or malicious intent.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Weak Cryptographic Algorithm
low_findings.description: The static analyzer flagged SKILL.md:3, but the line only contains the skill description in YAML front matter. It does not define or invoke cryptographic functionality.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The cited line is plain metadata text. There is no algorithm name, import, command, script, or executable code at this location.

content.value_statement: Long implementation plans can lose quality when executed without review points. This skill helps Claude, Codex, and Claude Code work through plans in verified batches with human feedback.
actual_capabilities: Loads and reviews a written implementation plan before work starts.
Identifies questions or concerns before executing plan tasks.
Executes tasks in small batches, starting with three tasks by default.
Tracks task progress from in progress to completed.
Runs plan-specified verification steps before reporting completion.
Pauses between batches for human review and feedback.
limitations: Requires an existing written plan to execute.
Does not create the original implementation plan.
Depends on the quality and clarity of the plan steps.
May stop for clarification when dependencies, tests, or instructions are unclear.

use_cases.title: Run a Prepared Development Plan
use_cases.description: Execute a reviewed engineering plan in manageable batches with verification after each task.

use_cases.title: Coordinate AI Coding Sessions
use_cases.description: Keep an AI assistant aligned to a plan while preserving checkpoints for feedback.

use_cases.title: Complete Structured Refactors
use_cases.description: Follow detailed refactor steps while stopping when tests fail or instructions become unclear.

prompt_templates.title: Execute This Plan
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the executing-plans skill to execute this implementation plan. Review it first, raise concerns, then start the first batch.

prompt_templates.title: Execute With Checkpoints
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the executing-plans skill for this plan. Complete the first three tasks, run the listed verifications, then stop for my feedback.

prompt_templates.title: Resume a Plan
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the executing-plans skill to continue from the last completed batch. Apply my feedback first, then execute the next batch.

prompt_templates.title: Audit Before Execution
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the executing-plans skill. Before implementation, review the plan for missing dependencies, unclear steps, risky assumptions, and verification gaps.

output_examples.input: Execute the first batch from my migration plan.
output_examples.output: The assistant reviews the plan, lists any concerns, completes the first three tasks, reports verification results, and waits for feedback.

output_examples.input: Continue after I changed task two.
output_examples.output: The assistant revisits the plan, applies the updated instruction, runs the next batch, and reports what changed.

output_examples.input: A verification step failed twice during execution.
output_examples.output: The assistant stops the batch, explains the blocker, shares the failing verification result, and asks for clarification.

best_practices: Provide a complete plan with small, verifiable tasks.
Include clear verification commands or acceptance checks for each batch.
Review each batch report before asking the assistant to continue.
anti_patterns: Using this skill without a written implementation plan.
Skipping verification output before moving to the next batch.
Forcing progress when dependencies or instructions are unclear.

faq.question: Does this skill write implementation plans?
faq.answer: No. It is designed to execute an existing written plan with review checkpoints.

faq.question: How many tasks does it execute at once?
faq.answer: The default first batch is three tasks unless the plan or user says otherwise.

faq.question: What happens if the plan has gaps?
faq.answer: The assistant should raise concerns before starting or stop when a blocker appears.

faq.question: Does it run tests automatically?
faq.answer: It runs the verification steps specified in the plan or requested by the user.

faq.question: Can it handle feedback between batches?
faq.answer: Yes. It applies feedback before continuing with the next batch.

faq.question: Is this skill safe to publish?
faq.answer: Yes. The reviewed file contains workflow instructions only and no executable code or dangerous access patterns.
